meaning: n.木麻黄属的各种常绿乔木
examples: The forest trees of regeneration of Casuarina grow well in the coastalsand land …
The experiments showed that the inoculation effect on Casuarina glauca was distinct.
Objective: to study the extraction and purification process of tannins from casuarina in order to provided theory basis for further application.
Should the mesquite be allowed to kill the casuarina trees by drilling its roots deeper and depriving them of water, as in some places it seems to be doing?
